title: prunus spinosa var. densa
intro: Prunus spinosa var. densa, also known as the dense blackthorn or sloe, is a variety of the blackthorn tree (Prunus spinosa) native to Europe and Asia. This thorny shrub or small tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent qualities. The health benefits of Prunus spinosa var. densa include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Prunus spinosa var. densa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies, such as Sloe gin, a traditional British liqueur made from the fruit.
